prompt_text:
### Demographics: 72-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Recurrent nocturnal hypoglycemia (2-4 episodes/month, self-resolved) over the last 3 months.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 18units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 66.6 kg; Height 165.5 cm; BMI 24.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/69 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.5%; 9 months ago 7.4%; 6 months ago 7.1%; 3 months ago 6.8%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 188mg/dL; 9 months ago 183mg/dL; 6 months ago 163mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.2kg; 9 months ago 64.7kg; 6 months ago 64.9kg; 3 months ago 64.8kg; current 66.6kg), Height (12 months ago 165.5cm; 9 months ago 165.5cm; 6 months ago 165.5cm; 3 months ago 165.5cm; current 165.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 71mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 69mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 8.0U/L; 3 months ago 9.0U/L; current 13U/L), AST (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 29U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; current 36mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 299mg/g; 9 months ago 286mg/g; 6 months ago 281mg/g; 3 months ago 345mg/g; current 299mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 100mg/dL; 9 months ago 100mg/dL; 6 months ago 99mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 170mg/dL; 9 months ago 166mg/dL; 6 months ago 154mg/dL; 3 months ago 166mg/dL; current 160mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.8g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
